death.attack.spector_spellbooks.ray_of_s: %1$s was sent to the afterlife by %2$s's ray of spector
death.attack.spector_spellbooks.spector_: %1$s was led to the grave by %2$s
spell.spector_spellbooks.poltergeistguid: Launches creatures within range into the air, and launches in the direction to caster look side. After that, inflict slow falling to creatures, and when they land, hurt based on the duration of the fall
spell.spector_spellbooks.ray_of_spectorg: Fire a beam of possessed by spector, can pass through blocks
spell.spector_spellbooks.shiftguide: Cast to inflict yourself with effect, an effect that makes you able travel through blocks and creative flying. When travel through block, it is impossible to see through to the ground
spell.spector_spellbooks.spector_arrowgu: Hold to charge a piercing possessed arrow. This arrow can travel through blocks
spell.spector_spellbooks.spector_boltgui: Fire a possessed by spector bolt that can travel through blocks. Creatures hit will glow, allowing you to lock on to them through walls
spell.spector_spellbooks.spector_breathg: Spew forth a cone of chilling breath, damaging creatures in its reach. This breath can pass through blocks
spell.spector_spellbooks.spector_slashgu: Slash forward to send out a piercing possessed by spector slash. This slash can travel through blocks
